field_map.target: Patient.HospitalNumber and V2 Patient URL HospitalNumber
field_map.note: selects FACIL identifier; identifier type is fixed LOCAL-1-0
selected by XSLT
title case normalized; given-name components are joined
DOB YYYYMMDD becomes YYYY-MM-DD; 1=M, 2=F, otherwise U

field_map.target: Patient address, phone/mobile/email, ethnic group, date/deceased state
field_map.note: address repeats; GB default; phones truncated to 20; NS becomes Z; death date reformatted
builds next-of-kin and optometrist contacts; GP is first 8 chars or default code

field_map.note: PV1-6 used for A12; datetime split into ISO date and HH:mm
derives Scheduled, Did Not Attend, transfer, arrival, departure or discharge status

ack.detail: The MLLP TCP sender validates returned HL7 acknowledgement codes AA/CA, AE/CE, AR/CR and waits up to 60 seconds; the HTTP listener returns a generated PatientList response.
ack.evidence: Sussex | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Sussex/PAS OUT.xml | Send Q21 TCP connector lines 172-197 and response validation lines 224-238; Respond script lines 835-838

field_map.note: only populated when hosnum exists; an empty QPD-3.1 prevents Send Q21

field_map.source: returned PID-3.1 where PID-3.5=FACIL or NHS
field_map.note: FACIL output code is literal ABC; NHS output code is NHS
title case normalized; DOB YYYYMMDD becomes YYYY-MM-DD

field_map.source: returned PID-11.*, PID-13.*, PID-22.1, PID-29.1 and PD1-3.3/PD1-4.1
field_map.target: PatientList address, phones, ethnic group, date of death, practice and GP
field_map.note: home address country is fixed GB; phones truncated to 20

session_persistence.evidence: Sussex | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Sussex/PAS OUT.xml | Send Q21 TCP connector lines 150-197; no authentication or globalMap/globalChannelMap access in active scripts

evidence.claim: The source transforms HTTP XML to HL7v2 QBP^Q21, sets a current datetime and message ID, and copies Parameters.hosnum to QPD-3.1.
evidence.location: Sussex | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Sussex/PAS OUT.xml | source transformer lines 50-137

evidence.claim: Send Q21 only runs when QPD-3.1 has a value; its response is parsed as HL7v2 then XSLT-transformed to PatientList, otherwise the response is an empty PatientList.
evidence.location: Sussex | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Sussex/PAS OUT.xml | Send Q21 filter lines 370-380; Convert K21 to XML script lines 413-423; response XSLT lines 560-620; Respond script lines 835-838

notes: The message type and trigger event are confirmed by the outbound QBP^Q21 template and the destination named Convert K21 to XML. The channel is a PAS query bridge, not an OpenEyes API caller.
